K499 R13 Cross-Vendor Benchmark LANDED -- Cathedral Effect confirmed at current-frontier tier. 800/800 calls ($22.23/$80 cap). 8 models x 4 vendors. Mean cathedral lift: +86.2pp (R10 baseline: +86.1pp -- stable). Opus 4.7: 98% HOT cathedral, Sonar Pro: 94%, Haiku 4.5: 90% (cheap!), GPT-5.5: 88%, Sonnet 4.6: 86%, GPT-5.4-mini: 82%, Gemini Flash: 80%, Gemini Pro: 74%. All cold HOT%: 0% (Sonar 2%). Gemini Flash (80%) beat Gemini Pro (74%). Haiku vs Opus: 8pp gap at 21.6x cost ratio. kappa(det,LLM)=0.751 (methodology note). Artifacts: REPORT, Cephas artifact, Substack lede, Wheelbarrow S5.6 updated, No Atomo row added. Synapse clusters: 21. Toolsmith: TS-022/TS-023/TS-024. Tag: v-r13-cross-vendor-benchmark-K499.
